item.title: Gateway and operate/ timeout constants scattered — not in config/defaults.ts
item.intent: All timeout and interval constants in gateway/ and operate/ must have a single source of truth in config/defaults.ts. Changing timeouts must require editing one file.
item.description: The same BUG-011/BUG-025 constant-scattering pattern applies to timeout and interval values. Key locations: src/gateway/client.ts:31 (DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS = 10_000), src/gateway/client.ts:32 (CONNECT_TIMEOUT_MS = 5_000), src/gateway/health.ts:19 (DEFAULT_INTERVAL_MS = 30_000), src/gateway/health.ts:20 (DEFAULT_HEALTH_TIMEOUT_MS = 5_000), src/operate/doctor/checks.ts:26 (EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS = 15_000), src/secure/credentials/probes.ts:37 (timeoutMs = 10_000). These are local-only constants — if you need to tune the gateway timeout for a slow network, you must find all the right files. The credentials probe timeout is especially important as it affects CI/CD pipelines. Steps: (1) add GATEWAY_RPC_TIMEOUT_MS = 10_000, GATEWAY_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_MS = 5_000, GATEWAY_HEALTH_INTERVAL_MS = 30_000, GATEWAY_HEALTH_TIMEOUT_MS = 5_000, DOCTOR_EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS = 15_000, CREDENTIALS_PROBE_TIMEOUT_MS = 10_000 to src/config/defaults.ts; (2) import and replace local constants in each file; (3) run gateway/ and operate/ tests. Scope: 6 files, no logic change. Pattern identical to BUG-011.
